prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SNOW-SHOVEL-8797FSS Product Type: SHOVEL_SPADE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 36-Inch Collapsible Easy to Store Foam Grip Snow Shovel Description: We are proud to present our ASR Outdoor 36-Inch Collapsible Foam Grip Snow Shovel. You can take this shovel apart for easy storage, or keep it together to have it ready whenever you need it. Our shovel is a great tool when it's snowing, for clearing paths, gardening, camping, or performing a variety of outdoor tasks.

To Assemble:
(1) Insert the shaft end and align the release button to the blades socket
(2) Unlock the collar and pull the handle until your desired length, and re-lock the collar Search Terms: shoveling snow clearing paths gardening camping outdoor activities Features: - LENGTH - 36" when assembled and fully extended - HANDLE - 4" Width and foam grip length of 5" - BLADE - Dimensions 9-1/2" x 12-3/4" x 2-1/2" - MATERIAL - Plastic blade with an iron handle for durability - USES - shoveling snow, clearing paths, gardening, camping, and other outdoor activities === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 36-Inch Collapsible Foam Grip Snow Shovel

anthropic.title_differentiation: Collapsible Design, Foam Grip Handle, 36 Inches Extended, Plastic Blade With Iron Handle, Gardening And Camping

openai.title_differentiation: Foam Grip Handle, Collapsible For Easy Storage, Plastic Blade, Iron Handle, 36-Inch Assembled Length, Multi-Use Outdoor Tool
